# Citizen

> Elevate your wiki

A beautiful, usable, and responsive MediaWiki skin

## Table of Contents

### Guide

- [Introduction](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/guide/introduction.md): Introduction to the Citizen skin
- [Installation](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/guide/installation.md): Installing the Citizen skin to your wiki

### Configuration

- [Configuration](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/config.md): MediaWiki skin configuration for the Citizen skin.
- [Extensions and gadgets](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/config/extensions.md): Extensions and gadgets that integrate well with Citizen

### Features

- [Command palette](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/features/command-palette.md): A keyboard-driven palette for jumping to pages, running actions, and searching the wiki.
- [Performance mode](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/features/performance-mode.md): A lightweight mode that strips animations and visual effects for fast page loads.
- [Preferences](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/features/preferences.md): A panel for personalizing the skin, extensible with on-wiki JSON or JavaScript.
- [Share](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/features/share.md): Share the current page via the browser's native share sheet or a configurable grid of services.

### Customization

- [Theming](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/customization/theming.md): Customizing the look and feel of Citizen
- [Utility classes](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/customization/utility-classes.md): CSS classes Citizen exposes for formatting and interactivity
- [Recipes](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/customization/recipes.md): Common customizations and CSS snippets for Citizen
- [Hooks](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/customization/hooks.md): JavaScript hooks provided by Citizen for extensions and gadgets

### Community

- [Showcase](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/community/showcase.md): A showcase of wikis using Citizen

### Project

- [Changelogs](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/changelogs.md): Changelogs of all Citizen stable releases.
- [Contribute](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/contribute.md): How to contribute to the Citizen skin.

### Other

- [Latest Changelog](/mediawiki-skins-Citizen/v3.16/changelogs/latest.md): Changelog of the latest version of Citizen.
